top_signals.title: China calls for APEC cooperation as commerce minister skips opening over ‘urgent official business’
top_signals.summary: China's international trade representative Li Chenggang said he was chairing Friday's meeting as Commerce Minister Wang Wentao had urgent matters to attend to.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Treasury yields fall as investors digest week of bond market volatility
top_signals.summary: The yield on the 10-year U.S. Treasury note — the key benchmark for U.S. government borrowing — fell more than 2 basis points to 4.564%.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Results of the March 2026 survey on credit terms and conditions in euro-denominated securities financing and OTC derivatives markets (SESFOD)
Bitcoin price record 90-day uptrend 'resembles bull market rally:' New analysis
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin rallied for 90 days after its dip below $60,000, breaking the record for the longest uptrend within a bear market in BTC price history.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: IMAX has held ‘preliminary talks’ with potential buyers, source says
top_signals.summary: IMAX has held "preliminary talks" through intermediaries, but no official pitches have been made directly by the company, a source told CNBC.

top_signals.title: Lawyers for alleged Prince Andrew trafficking victim now in contact with Police
top_signals.summary: The Police confirmed that they are “engaging” with the lawyers of a woman who claims she was trafficked for sex at Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor’s address in Windsor. In its first update on Friday, Thames Valley Police emphasised that if she wishes to report her allegations, they will be “taken seriously and handled with care, sensitivity and [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
